expansionSteps.title: Clone Campaign Template
expansionSteps.detail: Duplicate campaign manifest and day files, preserving IDs and unlock schema.

expansionSteps.title: Swap Narrative Inputs
expansionSteps.detail: Replace hook, location, villain profile, clue evidence, and branch anchors.

expansionSteps.title: Regenerate Artifacts and Prompts
expansionSteps.detail: Run generator to rebuild artifact definitions, image/audio prompts, and NPC dialogue packs.

expansionSteps.title: Tune Difficulty and Cadence
expansionSteps.detail: Adjust puzzle cadence, no-response escalations, and odd-hour windows per audience.

expansionSteps.title: Validate Full Month Playthrough
expansionSteps.detail: Run simulation and smoke tests across all days and branch anchors before release.

authoringGuardrails: Never ship disconnected day entries; each day must reference prior progression flags.
Maintain at least one misleading artifact every escalation cycle.
Include at least one awareness moment from day 09 onward.
